name: Daily Digest
description: Daily morning email summary of yesterday's workspace activity, sent to the owner at a scheduled time.

args.subject: Your morning update from {{orgName}}
args.body:
Morning {{firstName}},

Quick check-in before the chairs fill up. A few new patients reached out yesterday, and a handful of cleanings and consults moved through the books — nothing on fire, just steady momentum.

We'll keep things gentle on our end so you can focus on the smiles walking in today.

Warmly,
— Bright Smile Dental
